subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured of the signs of God! Souls have, with the essence of their hearts, turned unto the horizon of sanctification and beneath the shade of the Word of Unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بایات الله نفوسی بجوهر فواد توجه بافق تقدیس نمودند و در ظل کلمه توحید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @spiritual transformation
